name: Emergent Ontology API
description: Read-only JSON API for Emergent Ontology — a universal grammar of change based on nine primitive operators. All endpoints return static JSON. No authentication required.

manifest.description: This file — API discovery and endpoint listing

index.description: Site index with all content entries, navigation, and slug mapping. Start here for discovery.

content_list.description: All content items with summaries and preview text

content_item.description: Full content for a specific item. Use content_id from the index with ':' replaced by '-' (e.g., wiki:operators → wiki-operators.json)

operators.description: The nine EO operators with symbols, codes, labels, and wiki links

sitemap.description: Machine-readable JSON sitemap of all public URLs

content_types.wiki: Knowledge base articles about EO concepts and operators
content_types.experiment: Timestamped research entries (notes, datasets, results, charts)
